caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap and a matching green t-shirt with the white text "I CN NEVER DO SHIT" sits in a room that appears to be a clothing store or studio. He wears over-ear headphones and sits behind a professional microphone. The background features several framed photographs on a wall and a white mannequin wearing a white shirt. The man's facial expression shifts as the clip progresses; he begins with a skeptical, tight-lipped look, briefly closes his eyes, and then transitions to a slight smile and a speaking expression. Small logos are visible in the lower corners of the scene, including one that says "RED FLEXY TOT." The man remains seated and focused forward throughout the sequence, with the only significant changes being his subtle shifts in expression and head movement.
